content: GitHub REST API v3 endpoints for PECP needs: Create org team: POST /orgs/{org}/teams body {name, privacy: 'closed'} — returns 201 with {id, slug, html_url}. Create repo: POST /orgs/{org}/repos body {name, private: true, auto_init: false} — returns 201 with {html_url, clone_url, full_name}. Add member to team: PUT /orgs/{org}/teams/{team_slug}/memberships/{username} body {role: 'member'} — returns 200. Remove member: DELETE /orgs/{org}/teams/{team_slug}/memberships/{username} — returns 204. All require Authorization: Bearer {PAT} header and Accept: application/vnd.github+json. Common errors: 422 (team already exists), 404 (user not found for membership), 403 (PAT lacks org:write scope). The PAT needs scopes: repo (for repo creation) and admin:org (for team management and member sync). For team already exists (422), the API returns a message containing 'Name has already been taken' — check this to handle idempotent team creation gracefully.
